verse_specific_anchors: apahṛta-cetas — discriminating mind carried away (the attention-capture move)
bhoga-aiśvarya-prasakti — clinging to enjoyment-and-lordship (the specific attachment named)
samādhau na vidhīyate — does not establish in samādhi (the structural impossibility claim)
vyavasāyātmikā buddhi — recurrence of 2.41's term, signalling 2.41-2.44 as a unit
verdict_reason: The engineering analog is anchored in the specific 'attention-capture as causal blocker' framing, which is uniquely 2.44's contribution. 2.41 named the resolved buddhi; 2.42-43 named the attachment cause; 2.44 names the specific cognitive impossibility — samādhi cannot form because cetas is captured. The 'attention-budget allocation' diagnostic in the engineering layer requires precisely 2.44's apahṛta-cetas + samādhau na vidhīyate pair. Could not come from 2.45 (which names the imperative) or 2.41 (which names the precondition). PASS for both 7.6 and 3.5.
